job_title: Senior Analyst, Marketing Analytics & Insights (New York)
strengths: Strong SQL and BI tooling experience
Experience building ETL pipelines and data validation
Able to translate analysis into stakeholder recommendations
weaknesses: No direct MTA/MMM tool experience listed
Under 5 years B2B marketing analytics tenure
No Hockeystack or named attribution platform
improvement_bullets: Analyzed digital marketing performance across various channels, including Paid Search and Paid Social, to evaluate paid media effectiveness and identify performance drivers.
Translated insights from performance analyses and data modeling into actionable strategies that improve ROI and guide budget reallocations, in collaboration with Data Science.
Managed key marketing platforms and supported campaign operations, including budget optimization and allocation, to ensure data integrity and process efficiency.
Experience in forecasting and budget modeling for marketing spend, guiding investment decisions and ensuring budget alignment across channels.
Leveraged Marketing-mix modeling and multi-touch attribution model principles to translate complex data into strategic recommendations for improving ROI.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Analyst, Marketing Analytics & Insights (New York) opportunity with Justworks. I am interested in this opportunity because Justworks' mission to empower businesses by solving HR issues resonates with my passion for data-driven decision-making and operational efficiency. What interests me about working for Justworks is its data-driven approach and commitment to continuous iteration, which aligns perfectly with my professional philosophy.

I believe my strong SQL and BI tooling experience, coupled with my proven impact with quantified outcomes, would make me a strong candidate for this role. Throughout my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on translating complex data into actionable strategies. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed statistical models to identify high-value customer segments; targeted marketing initiatives informed by these models contributed to a 300% increase in revenue in the targeted segment over 12 months. This demonstrates my ability to leverage data to drive significant improvements in marketing performance and uncover opportunities for growth.

Ultimately, I know that the Senior Analyst, Marketing Analytics & Insights role at Justworks would allow me to bring my expertise in performance analysis and insights to effectively analyze digital marketing performance across multiple channels, identifying trends and uncovering opportunities for growth. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my reporting and visualization skills. I created Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%. This experience highlights my ability to streamline reporting processes and surface real-time insights that improve channel performance.

I’m excited by the opportunity to use my strategic thinking and cross-functional collaboration skills in working on performance analysis and insights at Justworks. I know that my ability to translate complex analytical findings into clear, actionable recommendations and my experience in data visualization align with what it takes to succeed in the Senior Analyst, Marketing Analytics & Insights role.

I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,
Justin Miller
